category_title: Students with untenable mainstream histories exhibiting workplace-related non-compliance like lateness
minimal_context: The student is arriving at the TAFE classroom at the start of the day and is expected to use the sign-in sheet.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: It is the start of the day. Please use the sign-in sheet.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Walks in late, speaking at a high decibel) Yeah, yeah, I made it.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You still need to sign in on the sheet.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I don't even want to be here. This place is just a shelter from unemployment.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please follow the classroom expectations and sign in.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I forgot to sign in. I'm tired from moving house.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: It is the start of the day. Please use the sign-in sheet.

STUDENT: (Walks in late, speaking at a high decibel) Yeah, yeah, I made it.

TUTOR: You still need to sign in on the sheet.

STUDENT: I don't even want to be here. This place is just a shelter from unemployment.

TUTOR: Please follow the classroom expectations and sign in.

STUDENT: I forgot to sign in. I'm tired from moving house.

task.content: Daily classroom routines (signing in/out) and arrival at the start of the day

context.environment: TAFE settings, described as volatile settings where students don't want to be
context.social_setting: Supported by a youth worker at all times

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When arriving late at the start of the day
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Explained he was tired from moving house and forgot to sign in/out

behavior_patterns.condition: When expected to follow standard school rules
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Continually flouted classroom expectations and exhibited non-compliant behaviours
behavior_patterns.internal_state: Experience of schooling is negative; find the school environment unsupportive
